title: A Colorful Past (Colored Archeology Pots)
body:
Hawwo!

So...

Why not colored pots?

I added some color to the decorated pots patterns and a little tweaks to the top and bottom textures.
Pottery ~~sherds~~ shards also colored.

This pack is for Java Edition (No need to unzip).

Lemme know if you have any suggestion or ideas for future texture packs. (You can reach me at Planet Minecraft: [valesde_valley](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/valesde_valley/))

Hope you enjoy (:
